description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a thick, rectangular double-sided head made of dark, metallic material. The head features a crosshatched texture on its striking faces, with gold or bronze accents along the edges, suggesting reinforced construction for durability. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of a dark, possibly rubberized or composite material, with a textured grip for enhanced handling and slip resistance. The shaft is proportionally shorter than the head is wide, indicating a tool designed for powerful, controlled strikes in demolition or construction tasks. The overall finish is industrial, with visible wear and scuff marks, giving it a rugged, well-used appearance. No visible brand or logo is present, and there are no additional attachments or accessories integrated into the design.
description: A rugged, double-sided sledgehammer with a textured, metallic head featuring gold accents and a dark, grippy handle. The tool shows signs of heavy use and is built for strength and durability.
description_view_0: End-on view of the hammer showing the square, crosshatched striking face and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full width of the double-sided head, gold edge accents, and the straight, textured handle.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0, with the same square striking face and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Reverse side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the head and handle, with less visible gold accent.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle with a dark, rubberized ergonomic grip and textured surface for slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, double-sided sledgehammer head with crosshatched striking faces and gold-accented edges, designed for heavy impact.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuff marks, scratches, and signs of wear on the head and handle.
